title: Restricting First Use of Nuclear Weapons Act of 2025
short_title: Restricting First Use of Nuclear Weapons Act of 2025
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations.
subjects: Presidents and presidential powers, Vice Presidents
crs_summary: Restricting First Use of Nuclear Weapons Act of 2025 This bill prohibits using federal funds to conduct a first-use nuclear strike unless Congress expressly authorizes such a strike pursuant to a declaration of war. A first-use nuclear strike is an attack using nuclear weapons against an enemy without confirming that there has been a nuclear strike against the United States, its territories, or its allies.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations.
